title: OECD/AIAS ICTWSS — Collective Bargaining Coverage
source_org: OECD (Employment, Labour and Social Affairs Directorate) / AIAS-HSI, University of Amsterdam
license_terms: OECD Terms and Conditions — free reuse with attribution (data jointly produced with AIAS-HSI)
notes: SDMX dataflow OECD.ELS.SAE:DSD_TUD_CBC@DF_CBC(1.0), 'Collective bargaining coverage'. Part of the OECD/AIAS ICTWSS database. MEASURE=ERB ('Employees with the right to bargain') among others. Companion to the trade-union-density dataset (same DSD_TUD_CBC data structure, different dataflow).
